changes.comment: New plugin package for Azure Blob Storage cache
Move Azure Blob cache to plugin; remove built-in azure-blob provider
Remove AzureBlobCacheStorageConfig from CacheStorageConfig union; add CustomCacheStoragePlugin and CustomCacheStorageConfig types
Support custom plugin providers via isCustomPluginProvider
Remove Azure credential handling; credentials are now managed by the @lage-run/azure-blob-cache-storage plugin
Remove AzureCredentialName export and Azure-specific type augmentation from CacheOptions
